data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: All available data points (xG, PPG, bookmaker odds) consistently indicate a strong likelihood for a Home Win. Potentials suggest a low-scoring match.
REASON: Unión Santa Fe's xG (1.72) and PPG (1.45) are significantly superior to Deportivo Riestra's (xG 1.31, PPG 0.64). Bookmaker odds of 1.91 reinforce this favoritism.
CONCLUSION: Home Win.
